# BP-143 variant positive: a go-redis Set Result is invoked as a bare expression.
lang: go
file: BP-143-variant-vulnerable.go
variant: redis-set-result-bare
---
package sample

import (
	"context"

	"github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

func saveName(ctx context.Context, rdb *redis.Client, key, value string) {
	rdb.Set(ctx, key, value, 0).Result()
}
